subject: Lincoln Elementary Weekly Newsletter - March 15
text:
Dear Parents,

Here are the upcoming events for next week:

1. Spring Concert - Thursday, March 20 at 6:30 PM in the school auditorium. All 3rd and 4th graders will perform. Please have your child wear their concert attire (white top, dark pants/skirt).

2. Field Day - Friday, March 21 from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM on the school fields. Volunteers are still needed! Please sign up at the front office by Wednesday.

3. Book Fair - Running all next week (March 17-21) in the library. Each class will visit during their scheduled library time.

Reminders:
- Science Fair projects are due Monday, March 17. Please make sure your child brings their project board and any materials.
- Permission slips for the zoo field trip (March 28) must be returned by March 21.
- Hot lunch orders for April are due by March 25.

Thank you,
Ms. Johnson
Lincoln Elementary Office
